coachAM: Your journal entries reveal a consistent pattern of morning gratitude and aspirational intent, yet your sleep and training protocols are collapsing, indicating a profound disconnect between your declared vision and your evening execution. The "loop scrolling" and "laziness" you acknowledge are not mere distractions, but symptoms of an unaddressed evening routine, directly sabotaging the physical and mental capital required to be the "lock in young" and "best worker" you declare each morning. This habitual neglect of your evening wind-down and preparation is the root cause, eroding the physiological and spiritual foundation that underpins all elite performance, making your daily "sprint" unsustainable and preventing any perfect day streak from materializing, ultimately stalling your trajectory towards sustained impact and growth. Today, before 7 PM, block out and hold sacred 60 minutes for a hard stop on all screen time, followed by a physical wind-down protocol—no exceptions.
